models.doc: The parameters for a specific changes request.

properties.name: resourceIds
properties.doc: Specifies the list of resources for a changes request.

properties.name: subscriptionId
properties.doc: The subscription id of resources to query the changes from.

properties.name: interval
properties.doc: Specifies the date and time interval for a changes request.

type.name: ResourceChangesRequestParametersInterval
type.doc: Specifies the date and time interval for a changes request.

baseModel.name: DateTimeInterval
baseModel.doc: An interval in time specifying the date and time for the inclusive start and exclusive end, i.e. `[start, end)`.

properties.name: StartOn
properties.doc: A datetime indicating the inclusive/closed start of the time interval, i.e. `[`**`start`**`, end)`. Specifying a `start` that occurs chronologically after `end` will result in an error.

properties.name: EndOn
properties.doc: A datetime indicating the exclusive/open end of the time interval, i.e. `[start, `**`end`**`)`. Specifying an `end` that occurs chronologically before `start` will result in an error.

properties.name: $skipToken
properties.doc: Acts as the continuation token for paged responses.

properties.name: $top
properties.doc: The maximum number of changes the client can accept in a paged response.

properties.name: table
properties.doc: The table name to query resources from.

properties.name: fetchPropertyChanges
properties.doc: The flag if set to true will fetch property changes

properties.name: fetchSnapshots
properties.doc: The flag if set to true will fetch change snapshots

models.name: ResourceChangeList
models.doc: A list of changes associated with a resource over a specific time interval.

properties.name: changes
properties.doc:
The pageable value returned by the operation, i.e. a list of changes to the resource.

- The list is ordered from the most recent changes to the least recent changes.
- This list will be empty if there were no changes during the requested interval.
- The `Before` snapshot timestamp value of the oldest change can be outside of the specified time interval.

valueType.name: ResourceChangeData
valueType.doc: Data on a specific change, represented by a pair of before and after resource snapshots.

properties.name: resourceId
properties.doc: The resource for a change.

properties.name: changeId
properties.doc: The change ID. Valid and unique within the specified resource only.

properties.name: beforeSnapshot
properties.doc: The snapshot before the change.

baseModel.name: ResourceSnapshotData
baseModel.doc: Data on a specific resource snapshot.

properties.name: snapshotId
properties.doc: The ID of the snapshot.

properties.name: timestamp
properties.doc:
The time when the snapshot was created.
The snapshot timestamp provides an approximation as to when a modification to a resource was detected.  There can be a difference between the actual modification time and the detection time.  This is due to differences in how operations that modify a resource are processed, versus how operation that record resource snapshots are processed.

properties.name: content
properties.doc: The resource snapshot content (in resourceChangeDetails response only).

properties.name: afterSnapshot
properties.doc: The snapshot after the change.

properties.name: changeType
properties.doc: The change type for snapshot. PropertyChanges will be provided in case of Update change type

properties.name: propertyChanges
properties.doc: An array of resource property change

properties.name: propertyName
properties.doc: The property name

properties.name: beforeValue
properties.doc: The property value in before snapshot

properties.name: afterValue
properties.doc: The property value in after snapshot

properties.name: changeCategory
properties.doc: The change category.

properties.name: propertyChangeType
properties.doc: The property change Type

properties.name: $skipToken
properties.doc: Skip token that encodes the skip information while executing the current request

properties.doc: Specifies the list of resources for a change details request.

models.name: ResourceQueryContent
models.doc: Describes a query to be executed.

properties.name: subscriptions
properties.doc: Azure subscriptions against which to execute the query.

properties.name: managementGroups
properties.doc: Azure management groups against which to execute the query. Example: [ 'mg1', 'mg2' ]

properties.name: query
properties.doc: The resources query.

properties.name: options
properties.doc: The query evaluation options

properties.name: $skipToken
properties.doc: Continuation token for pagination, capturing the next page size and offset, as well as the context of the query.

properties.name: $top
properties.doc: The maximum number of rows that the query should return. Overrides the page size when ```$skipToken``` property is present.

properties.name: $skip
properties.doc: The number of rows to skip from the beginning of the results. Overrides the next page offset when ```$skipToken``` property is present.

properties.name: resultFormat
properties.doc: Defines in which format query result returned.

properties.name: allowPartialScopes
properties.doc: Only applicable for tenant and management group level queries to decide whether to allow partial scopes for result in case the number of subscriptions exceed allowed limits.

properties.name: authorizationScopeFilter
properties.doc: Defines what level of authorization resources should be returned based on the which subscriptions and management groups are passed as scopes.

properties.name: facets
properties.doc: An array of facet requests to be computed against the query result.

valueType.name: FacetRequest
valueType.doc: A request to compute additional statistics (facets) over the query results.

properties.name: expression
properties.doc: The column or list of columns to summarize by

properties.name: options
properties.doc: The options for facet evaluation

properties.name: sortBy
properties.doc: The column name or query expression to sort on. Defaults to count if not present.

properties.name: sortOrder
properties.doc: The sorting order by the selected column (count by default).

properties.name: filter
properties.doc: Specifies the filter condition for the 'where' clause which will be run on main query's result, just before the actual faceting.

properties.name: $top
properties.doc: The maximum number of facet rows that should be returned.

properties.name: totalRecords
properties.doc: Number of total records matching the query.

properties.name: count
properties.doc: Number of records returned in the current response. In the case of paging, this is the number of records in the current page.

properties.name: resultTruncated
properties.doc: Indicates whether the query results are truncated.

properties.name: $skipToken
properties.doc: When present, the value can be passed to a subsequent query call (together with the same query and scopes used in the current request) to retrieve the next page of data.

properties.name: data
properties.doc: Query output in JObject array or Table format.

properties.name: facets
properties.doc: Query facets.

valueType.name: Facet
valueType.doc: A facet containing additional statistics on the response of a query. Can be either FacetResult or FacetError.

properties.name: expression
properties.doc: Facet expression, same as in the corresponding facet request.

FacetResult.name: FacetResult
FacetResult.doc: Successfully executed facet containing additional statistics on the response of a query.

properties.name: totalRecords
properties.doc: Number of total records in the facet results.

properties.name: count
properties.doc: Number of records returned in the facet response.

properties.name: data
properties.doc: A JObject array or Table containing the desired facets. Only present if the facet is valid.

properties.name: resultType
properties.doc: Result type

FacetError.name: FacetError
FacetError.doc: A facet whose execution resulted in an error.

properties.name: errors
properties.doc: An array containing detected facet errors with details.

properties.name: resultType
properties.doc: Result type
